description: Current actionable recommendations. Generated each session based on signals, predictions, and market forecasts. Accuracy is tracked to build confidence over time.

market_regime.label: DE-ESCALATION_REAL
market_regime.dominant_risk: April 10 Islamabad talks — ceasefire is 2-week truce (April 8-22), not permanent peace. Talks failure = war premium returns and Nifty could give back 2-4%.
market_regime.key_risk: April 10 Islamabad talks could fail, collapsing the 2-week ceasefire and reversing today's rally.
market_regime.regime_note: CONFIRMED EOD April 8: Nifty +3.78% to 23,997.35 (best day in 11 months). Brent -17.55% to $93.13. RBI kept policy repo rate unchanged (additional tailwind). Top sectors: Aviation +8-10%, Auto +7-9%, Paints. IndiGo hit upper circuit at ₹4,614.90. TCS Q4FY26 results tomorrow (April 9) — IT catalyst on deck. Next binary event: April 10 Islamabad talks.
market_regime.session_forecast_accuracy_note: April 8 forecast WRONG (predicted DOWN -0.8%, actual UP +3.78%). FORECAST_PAT003 identified and promoted to framework.

actions.instruction: DOWNGRADED from HIGH to LOW urgency. Ceasefire relief has SWIGGY at ₹281.45. A001 sell window (₹278-285) has been hit during April 8 relief rally — if you haven't sold yet, monitor on April 9. Any morning strength to ₹280-285 is still a valid partial sell opportunity. The Q4 results May 8 remain the structural catalyst.
actions.rationale_short: P007 scored WRONG on ceasefire, but SWIGGY still has no profitability catalyst. A001 target range (₹278-285) was reached intraday on April 8. If hadn't exited, April 9 may offer another window.
actions.confidence_basis: Ceasefire gave A001 the sell window. P001 bearish thesis (₹260 breach) still open but requires 7.7% drop from current ₹281. Confidence reduced.

signal_details.T001: ₹260 52-week support held. Now ₹281 — modest bounce on relief.
signal_details.M003: April 7 FII sold ₹8,692 Cr. April 8 FII flows pending — likely net positive on ceasefire.

actions.pnl_impact_if_right: Exit at ₹280-285 protects against P001 downside to ₹260
actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: If SWIGGY rallies to ₹300+ on Q4 surprise, missed upside
actions.risk: Q4 FY26 results May 8 — any positive surprise could trigger sharp reversal

actions.instruction: DOWNGRADED from CRITICAL to LOW. Ceasefire has removed the acute ATF cost risk scenario. IndiGo closed at ₹4,614.90 (+8.11%) — DO NOT sell at these levels. The sell trigger (Brent >$115 OR strikes) is now INACTIVE. Next action review: April 10 Islamabad talks. If talks fail → war premium returns → Brent could spike → re-evaluate A002 sell trigger. If talks progress → hold for Q4 results (May) for next catalyst.
actions.rationale_short: INDIGO reversed dramatically on ceasefire. P013 thesis (₹4,100) invalidated. P015 (stabilize above ₹4,150) is tracking well above target. Hold and monitor April 10 talks.
actions.confidence_basis: Regime change from WAR_PREMIUM to DE-ESCALATION removes immediate downside. Q4FY26 margin damage still a medium-term headwind (results May).

signal_details.M001: Brent at $93.13 — well below ₹110 that was causing ATF concern. ATF cost relief is real.

actions.pnl_impact_if_right: Holding INDIGO through earnings (May) — ceasefire = partial recovery in stock
actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: April 10 talks fail → Brent spikes → ATF cost concern returns → INDIGO could give back 3-5%
actions.risk: Islamabad talks outcome (April 10) is the key binary for INDIGO now

actions.instruction: HOLD — thesis strengthened. Coal India at ~₹449.20. P005 (>₹430) is ON TRACK with ₹19 buffer. Ceasefire + Brent crash to $93.13 actually INCREASES coal's relative cost advantage vs crude. No action needed.
actions.rationale_short: P005 Coal India thesis is now at confidence 4★. Ceasefire strengthens the crude-coal cost differential. Domestic demand insulation intact.
actions.confidence_basis: P005 confirming ahead of schedule. ₹449.20 vs ₹430 target with 50 days remaining.

signal_details.S008: Coal e-auction premiums elevated — power sector demand strong
signal_details.M006: PSU rerating theme — Coal India dividend yield provides price floor

actions.instruction: UPGRADED from WATCH to HOLD. Hormuz safe passage protocol confirmed in ceasefire terms. ADANI PORT at ₹1,453.30. P019 (test ₹1,490-1,540) is new bullish thesis. Don't sell — Hormuz reopening is a direct revenue catalyst. Monitor April 10 talks for confirmation of extended ceasefire.

actions.confidence_basis: P019 thesis is multi-factor. April 10 talks are the key risk event.

signal_details.M001: Hormuz safe passage protocol confirmed — shipping lanes open
signal_details.S005: Port infrastructure re-rating on traffic restoration visibility

actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: April 10 talks fail → Hormuz concern returns → give back gains

actions.instruction: EXIT TRIGGER ACTIVATED: (1) Ceasefire confirmed ✓ (2) Hormuz safe passage protocol ✓ (3) Gold war premium compression underway. Review position size immediately. Original exit trigger was 'ceasefire + Hormuz reopened + gold <$5,100/oz'. First two conditions are MET. If gold is at/below $5,100/oz (check April 9 morning), CONSIDER SELLING 50-75% of SETFGOLD position. Keep 25-30% as residual hedge for April 10 talks risk. P020 predicts SETFGOLD corrects to ₹120-122 (from ₹125.59) within 7 days. This is your exit window.
actions.rationale_short: War hedge exit trigger activated by ceasefire. Gold war premium will compress over next 7-14 days. P020 provides the prediction framework for the timing.
actions.confidence_basis: Historical: gold corrects 3-7% within 1 week of major ceasefire events. P020 target ₹120-122 (4-4.5% downside). Keep partial position for April 10 binary.

signal_details.M008: Gold war premium being compressed by ceasefire announcement
signal_details.M001: Brent crashed to $93.13 — geopolitical risk premium removed from commodities broadly

actions.pnl_impact_if_right: Exiting SETFGOLD near peak protects against 4-7% correction as war premium unwinds
actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: April 10 talks fail → ceasefire collapses → gold rebounds → missed upside on the 25-30% retained
actions.risk: Islamabad talks failure = gold rebounds. Retain partial position as hedge.

actions.instruction: Watch — earnings April 16. Ceasefire improves fiscal outlook (lower crude import bill = more government capex room). If earnings show FY26 loan book >₹70,000 Cr, consider adding. April 9-15: No action. April 16: Earnings decision day.
actions.rationale_short: IREDA earnings April 16 remains the catalyst. Ceasefire is a modest positive (fiscal room for capex). No action before April 16.
actions.confidence_basis: Earnings catalyst April 16. Ceasefire slightly improves the capex environment.
actions.risk: Earnings miss on loan book growth

actions.instruction: REVERSED from WATCH (bearish) to HOLD_FOR_RECOVERY (bullish). P002 bearish thesis (₹160-170) is INVALIDATED by Brent crashing to $93.13. New thesis P017 targets ₹200-210 in 4 weeks on GRM recovery. At ₹182.70, MRPL has meaningful upside if Brent stabilizes $95-105. Do not sell — hold for GRM recovery play. Next review: April 15.
actions.rationale_short: MRPL thesis completely reversed. P002 (bearish) invalidated. P017 (₹200-210 GRM recovery) is the new active thesis. Ceasefire + Brent at $93 = GRM recovery runway.
actions.confidence_basis: P017 multi-factor: Brent crash, GRM recovery, Q1FY27 guidance refresh. Confidence 3.

signal_details.M001: Brent at $93.13 — well below $100. GRM recovery thesis is now active.

actions.pnl_impact_if_right: MRPL recovers to ₹200-210 (P017 target) by May 8

actions.instruction: ASTRA MICRO at ₹1,019.45 — approaching P012 target of ₹1,050-1,080. Do NOT buy more at this level. Consider PARTIAL PROFIT-TAKING on 25-35% of position if stock approaches ₹1,050. War premium is extended by 2-week ceasefire (good for defense) but April 10 Islamabad talks are a risk event. If talks show progress toward broader deal, defense premium could unwind quickly. Monitor daily.
actions.rationale_short: P012 target ₹1,050-1,080 is within reach. Partial profit-taking is prudent as war premium reaches maximum in 2-week managed tension scenario. April 10 is the key risk event for defense sector.
actions.confidence_basis: P012 is tracking. ₹1,019.45 → ₹1,050-1,080 is +3-6% away. Defense premium maximized in current scenario (M012).

signal_details.S003: Defense electronics thrive in 2-week managed tension scenario (M012)

market_actions.instruction: Brent closed at $93.13 on April 8 (down 17.55%). REGIME CHANGED from WAR_PREMIUM to RELIEF. New watch levels: If Brent recovers above $100 → regime change back toward WAR_PREMIUM risk, re-evaluate MRPL P017 and INDIGO P015. If Brent stays $88-97 → de-escalation confirmed, MRPL recovery thesis strengthens.

scenarios.above_100: REGIME CONCERN — war premium returning? Re-evaluate A002 (INDIGO sell trigger) and A007 (MRPL recovery thesis)
scenarios.95_to_100: WATCH ZONE — Brent stabilization. MRPL GRM recovery thesis tracking. No action.
scenarios.88_to_95: CURRENT ZONE — De-escalation confirmed. MRPL recovery play (P017) is strong.
scenarios.below_88: DEMAND DESTRUCTION fear — double-edged: good for airlines/autos but signals global recession risk

market_actions.instruction: NEXT BINARY EVENT: April 10 Islamabad talks (10 AM IST + 12:30 PM IST sessions). This is the NEXT regime-defining event. Three outcomes: (1) Talks progress → ceasefire extends to 4+ weeks → DE-ESCALATION_DEEPENING. (2) Talks neutral/delayed → ceasefire holds 2 weeks as planned. (3) Talks fail → ceasefire collapses → WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN. Morning brief on April 10 must prioritize this before any other action.

scenarios.talks_progress: BULLISH — Extend all positions. SETFGOLD exit accelerated. Defense premium compresses. P019 ADANI PORT thesis strengthens.
scenarios.talks_neutral: SIDEWAYS — Hold positions. 2-week ceasefire timeline intact. Next review April 22 (ceasefire expiry).
scenarios.talks_fail: BEARISH — WAR_PREMIUM returns. Re-activate A002 (INDIGO SELL trigger). SETFGOLD hold all. ASTRA MICRO new high. Nifty gives back 2-4%.

market_actions.instruction: TCS announcing Q4FY26 results on April 9. P018 predicts TCS above ₹2,600. Entry price ₹2,555.30. Key metrics to watch: (1) Revenue growth QoQ and YoY (2) EBIT margin guidance for FY27 (3) Deal wins volume and TCV (4) FY27 revenue growth guidance. If TCS beats on all 4 → IT sector rally. If guidance disappoints → IT could give back April 7-8 gains. Feeds directly into P014 (Nifty IT outperform thesis).

scenarios.beats_all_metrics: TCS above ₹2,650 → P018 RIGHT early → P014 confidence 4★
scenarios.in_line: TCS stays ₹2,520-2,600 → P018 tracking → P014 intact
scenarios.misses_guidance: TCS drops to ₹2,450-2,480 → P018 at risk → P014 confidence 2★

All flight/port/PSU theses now positive. Defense remains extended (managed tension premium). Gold hedge exit window open.
